Up Only Fund — machine-readable summary
========================================

Name: Up Only Fund
Tagline: Smart Agent Fund on Solana
Focus: Venture & strategic capital on Solana, live portfolio disclosures, $UPONLY liquid sleeve, and command dashboard for market intelligence.

What this site is
-----------------
Up Only Fund is an independent allocator brand with a published mandate, profitable operating book, and institutional-grade dashboard. It is not financial advice or a guarantee of returns.

Where to follow
---------------
- X: https://x.com/uponly_fund
- Telegram: https://t.me/uponly_fund

App routes (typical)
--------------------
- / — fund landing (marketing, mandate, portfolio)
- /terminal — command dashboard / terminal layout
- /overview — markets overview
- /market, /wallet, /simulator, /insights, /create-token — dashboard modules

Set the public origin for metadata with VITE_PUBLIC_SITE_ORIGIN (see src/config/site.ts).
